quality.completeness: Excellent. Contains all necessary fields: slug, name, class, level, description, and subclass flag.

mechanics.effect: Choose one ability score to increase by 2 OR two ability scores by 1 each.
mechanics.notes: This feature mirrors the standard ASI provided to all classes at these levels, confirming its mechanical standard implementation for the Monk class.
